ProductAnalysis.systemDesc: Polycarbonate canopy system includes wall brackets, reinforced center frame, reinforced columns, downpipes, gutters, and various colors of polycarbonate solid panels, diamond particle panels, or raindrop particle panels.
ProductAnalysis.whyDesc1: In canopy and skylight projects, it’s not the steel frame — it’s the panel that determines longevity. Low-grade sheets can yellow, crack, or leak within a few years, leading to costly replacements.
ProductAnalysis.whyDesc2: Our premium polycarbonate features a single-sided UV co-extruded layer, preserving clarity and durability for over 10 years.
ProductAnalysis.whyDesc3: Choose quality from the start — Save on maintenance and enjoy peace of mind.
ProductAnalysis.altSystemImg: Exploded view of canopy structure with labeled components
ProductAnalysis.altCompareImg: Comparison of high-quality and low-quality polycarbonate sheets

ProductFeatures.mainFeatAlt: Polycarbonate canopy product features engineered for snow load resistance, uv protection, wind and rain defense, and impact resistance
ProductFeatures.mainFeatZoomTip: 🔍 Click to view comprehensive features blueprint
ProductFeatures.subDesc: See how our structures handle extreme real-world challenges
ProductFeatures.feat1Desc: High impact resistance with German-imported polycarbonate sheets — offering 200 to 300 times the impact strength of regular glass. Commonly known as 'unbreakable glass' or 'steel-like transparency'.
ProductFeatures.feat1Alt: Hammer striking polycarbonate canopy panel demonstrating high impact resistance
ProductFeatures.feat2Desc: Robust and formable, the panels are easy to install and can be cold-bent into arched or dome-shaped structures.
ProductFeatures.feat2Alt: Person bending a polycarbonate sheet to demonstrate its excellent flexibility
ProductFeatures.feat3Desc: Inspected by China Anti-fire Building Material Quality Supervision Bureau and following the GB8624-1997 standard, polycarbonate Sheet has achieved Grade B1 of flame resistance.
ProductFeatures.feat3Alt: Lighter flame testing the flame-retardant property of the polycarbonate panel
ProductFeatures.feat4Desc: The canopy uses German-imported polycarbonate panels that block ultraviolet rays, withstand high temperatures, and help reduce indoor heat. Treated with a single-sided UV co-extruded layer, the panels effectively insulate against heat and block external UV radiation, ensuring safety for you and your family.
ProductFeatures.feat4Alt: Polycarbonate canopy under sunlight demonstrating UV protection
ProductFeatures.feat5Desc: During rainy seasons, the drainage system ensures smooth water flow without blockage or splashing. It effectively solves problems such as water accumulation and overflow during heavy rain. The widened gutter design allows faster drainage.
ProductFeatures.feat5Alt: Close-up view of the independent gutter system featuring a curved downspout on the polycarbonate canopy
ProductFeatures.feat6Desc: During rainy seasons, the drainage system ensures smooth water flow without blockage or splashing. It effectively solves problems such as water accumulation and overflow during heavy rain. The widened gutter design allows faster drainage.
ProductFeatures.feat6Alt: Enhanced drainage system with an extended downspout and widened gutter section for improved water flow on the polycarbonate canopy
ProductFeatures.feat7Desc: Withstands the impact of Category 12 typhoons with exceptional resilience. The surface is treated with electrostatic powder coating for excellent corrosion resistance.
ProductFeatures.feat7Alt: Polycarbonate canopy installed in heavy snowfall area, showcasing its snow-resistant performance and detailed aluminum alloy construction
ProductFeatures.feat8Desc: Featuring a modular system structure for simple assembly, with high-strength support beams and specialized quick-installation technology that saves time and effort.
ProductFeatures.feat8Alt: Step-by-step installation collage showing brackets, panels, and final setup of the polycarbonate canopy, highlighting its simple assembly process

factory.title: Polycarbonate & Aluminum
factory.subtitle: Discover how we produce and process our polycarbonate sheets and aluminum structures with state-of-the-art equipment and rigorous quality control.
factory.pcDesc: Our polycarbonate sheets are manufactured using German-imported Bayer/SABIC virgin raw materials with UV-resistant additives. We operate advanced OMIPA co-extrusion lines for superior sheet quality, precision thickness control, and long-lasting performance.
factory.pcImg1Alt: Premium Polycarbonate Resin and UV Protection Additives from Bayer or SABIC
factory.pcImg2Alt: Real-time quality control on Italian OMIPA extrusion line producing transparent solid polycarbonate sheet
factory.pcImg3Alt: OMIPA system precision feeding and advanced UV co-extrusion technology for consistent sheet quality
factory.alDesc: Our aluminum alloy profiles are precision-extruded from 6063-T5 aerospace-grade material. The dedicated assembly workshop ensures every frame structure meets strict quality standards before packaging and global shipping.
factory.alImg1Alt: High-quality aluminum tubes and profiles stored in organized warehouse area
factory.alImg2Alt: Assembled aluminum frame structures for polycarbonate canopy system in the workshop
factory.alImg3Alt: Aluminum frame storage and delivery readiness before packaging and shipping

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Thank you for visiting PolyCanopy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you interact with our website, request information, or submit project-related documents. We value your privacy and are committed to safeguarding the information you share with us.
PrivacyPolicy.section1Content:
We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide through our website’s contact forms or communication channels. This may include:
• Full Name
• Email Address
• Phone Number
• Country or Region
• Company Name (optional)
• Message or inquiry content
• Uploaded files (e.g., drawings, requirements, project specifications)
• Non-personal technical data, such as IP address, browser type, and page visits (for analytics only)
PrivacyPolicy.section2Content:
We use the data we collect for the following purposes:
• To respond to your inquiries or quotation requests
• To analyze your project needs and provide suitable product solutions
• To communicate with you regarding follow-ups or technical consultations
• To improve our website functionality and customer experience
• To comply with applicable legal or regulatory obligations
PrivacyPolicy.section3Title: 3. How We Store and Protect Your Information
PrivacyPolicy.section3Content:
Your information is stored securely on password-protected systems. Access is limited to authorized personnel within PolyCanopy who require the information to fulfill your request or support your project.
We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to prevent unauthorized access, loss, or misuse of your data.
PrivacyPolicy.section4Content: Any files you upload (such as CAD drawings, design documents, or specifications) are treated as confidential. These materials will not be shared or distributed without your permission, and are only used internally for reviewing your project requirements.
PrivacyPolicy.section5Content:
We retain personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law. For example:
• Inquiries and contact records: retained for up to 2 years for follow-up purposes
• Uploaded files: stored securely and deleted upon your request
• Email communications: retained as part of our business correspondence, unless deletion is requested
PrivacyPolicy.section6Content:
No. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to third parties. We may share your information only in the following cases:
• When legally required (e.g., government requests, compliance with applicable law)
• With trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website (under confidentiality obligations)
PrivacyPolicy.section7Content: We currently do not use cookies for advertising or profiling purposes. However, we may use basic analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) to collect anonymous data about how visitors interact with our website. This helps us improve site design and user experience. You may disable cookies via your browser settings.
PrivacyPolicy.section8Content:
Depending on your country or jurisdiction, you may have the right to:
• Access your personal data
• Request correction or deletion of your data
• Withdraw consent to data processing
• Request a copy of the data we hold about you
To exercise these rights, please contact us at sales@polycanopy.com
PrivacyPolicy.section9Content: Our website may contain links to external websites (such as WhatsApp, YouTube, or social media). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those websites. We recommend that you review their privacy policies before providing any personal data.
PrivacyPolicy.section10Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in legal requirements or our practices. The latest version will always be posted on this page with a revised effective date.
PrivacyPolicy.section11Content:
If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or your data, please contact us:
Email: sales@polycanopy.com
Website: www.polycanopy.com

ReturnPolicy.title: Return & Refund Policy
ReturnPolicy.intro: At PolyCanopy, we design and manufacture made-to-order canopy systems, sunrooms, and architectural structures tailored to each customer’s specific needs. Due to the customized nature of our products, our return and refund policy differs from standard e-commerce stores. Please review the following terms carefully before placing your order.
ReturnPolicy.section1Content:
All of our products are custom-made based on your specifications, including dimensions, material selection, finish, and structure type. As such, we are unable to accept returns or offer refunds for reasons including:
• Change of mind after order confirmation
• Incorrect measurements or project data provided by the customer
• Unexpected fitment issues not related to product defect
We strongly recommend reviewing all specifications, drawings, and requirements with our team before finalizing your order.
ReturnPolicy.section2Content: You may request a modification or cancellation of your order within 48 hours of order confirmation and before production has started. Once fabrication has begun, we cannot modify or cancel the order, and full production fees will apply.
ReturnPolicy.section3Content:
If your products arrive damaged during shipping or contain manufacturing defects, please notify us within 48 hours of receipt. To file a claim, send the following to sales@polycanopy.com:
• Order number or invoice
• Clear photos of the damage or defect
• Description of the issue and affected components
Upon confirmation, we will offer a suitable solution such as replacement parts, repair kits, or partial refunds depending on the severity of the issue. In cases where replacement is necessary, PolyCanopy will cover the shipping cost.
ReturnPolicy.section4Content:
We do not accept returns of completed custom products. However, under certain approved cases (e.g. non-custom accessories shipped in error), returns may be arranged subject to the following conditions:
• Return request is made within 7 days of delivery
• Products must be unused, undamaged, and returned in original or equivalent packaging
• Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer
ReturnPolicy.section5Content: PolyCanopy products are backed by a limited structural warranty. Warranty terms vary based on the product type and will be confirmed during quotation. Normal wear and tear, misuse, improper installation, or weather-related damage are not covered. Please retain all technical documents for warranty reference.
ReturnPolicy.section6Content: PolyCanopy shall not be held responsible for delays or inability to fulfill orders due to events beyond our control, including but not limited to natural disasters, shipping disruptions, or supplier shortages.
ReturnPolicy.section7Content:
If you have questions about our return or warranty policy, please contact our support team:
PolyCanopy
Email: sales@polycanopy.com
Website: www.polycanopy.com

ProductRange.title: Our Product Range
ProductRange.desc: Comprehensive canopy solutions for every architectural need

horizontal.title: Horizontal Beam Style
horizontal.desc: The Horizontal Beam Style canopy features a classic cross-beam structure with a clean, modern appearance. It offers strong support and is ideal for balconies, windows, and entrances.

suspended.title: Suspended Cable Style
suspended.desc: The Suspended Cable Style uses a sleek steel cable system to hold the canopy overhead, creating a lightweight and elegant design. This space-saving solution is especially suited for window awnings.

top_beam.title: Top Beam Style
top_beam.desc: The Top Beam Style canopy is supported by beams at the top, offering excellent stability and full coverage. This structure is commonly used for villa entrances, terraces, or large window areas.

column.title: Column Support Style
column.desc: The Column Support Style features vertical columns in front and back for maximum load-bearing capacity. This canopy covers a wide area, making it ideal for terraces, storefronts, and residential carports.

inner_corner.title: Inner Corner Style
inner_corner.desc: The Inner Corner Style canopy is tailored for inner wall junctions, such as L-shaped balconies or passageways. It provides excellent drainage and extended shelter coverage in tight spaces.

outer_corner.title: Outer Corner Style
outer_corner.desc: The Outer Corner Style is designed to fit around the outer angles of a building, extending the protective area seamlessly. It’s perfect for covering corner balconies, storefronts, or external walkways.

carport.title: Carport Style
carport.desc: The Carport Style canopy is specifically designed to shield vehicles from sun, rain, and debris. Supported by strong posts and topped with durable materials, it offers excellent protection.

door_window.title: Door & Window Awning Style
door_window.desc: This style is specifically designed for installation above doors and windows, providing effective protection from rain and direct sunlight. Compact yet durable, it keeps entryways dry.

Features.title: Product Features
Features.subtitle: Designed to perform under pressure — rain, wind, snow, and impact.

waterproof.title: Waterproof
waterproof.desc: Shields against rain, rust, corrosion, and surface damage — for lasting protection in all weather.

impact.title: Impact Resistant
impact.desc: Built to withstand force and impact from falling debris, ensuring long-term structural integrity.

wind.title: Wind Protection
wind.desc: Stable and secure against strong winds, reducing sway and protecting what’s beneath.

snow.title: Snow Load Resistant
snow.desc: Engineered to bear heavy snow loads without bending or cracking, even in extreme cold.

CustomService.title: Custom Design Services
CustomService.desc: Every project is unique. We provide flexible customization for all components to match your exact specifications.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our polycarbonate canopies

questions.q: Can the canopy be customized to fit my space?
questions.a: Yes! We offer full customization in terms of dimensions, colors, panel thickness, and frame styles to fit residential or commercial applications. Just send us your measurements and preferences.

questions.q: Is polycarbonate really stronger than glass?
questions.a: Absolutely. Polycarbonate sheets are up to 200 times stronger than glass and are virtually unbreakable. They are also lighter and safer in harsh weather conditions like hail, wind, and heavy rain.

questions.q: Does the awning block UV rays?
questions.a: Yes, all our awnings come with UV-resistant coatings that block over 99% of harmful UV radiation, protecting your furniture, doors, and windows from sun damage.

Most installations take several hours for a standard-size awning. We provide easy-to-follow instructions and all necessary accessories. For larger or commercial projects, our team offers professional installation support.

questions.q: How durable is the awning in extreme weather?
questions.a: Our polycarbonate awnings are engineered to withstand strong wind loads, heavy rain, and snow. The aluminum alloy brackets and stainless steel fittings ensure long-term durability and corrosion resistance.
We provide a 10-year limited warranty covering material defects, discoloration, and structural performance. Full warranty details are available upon request.

questions.q: Do you offer bulk pricing for distributors or builders?
questions.a: Yes, we offer tiered wholesale pricing and OEM/ODM services for partners, contractors, and distributors. Please contact our sales team for a customized quote.

questions.q: What colors and finishes are available?
questions.a: Our polycarbonate panels come in clear, grey, bronze, and blue tints. Frame colors include matte black, white, silver, and custom RAL options.

Testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
Testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by customers worldwide for quality and service
Testimonials.ariaLabel: Customer reviews and star ratings section

reviews.name: Eric Zhang
reviews.text: The canopy held up perfectly during a sudden heavy rainstorm right after installation. The drainage design is smart, and the aluminum frame feels very solid. Will definitely use PolyCanopy for future projects.

reviews.name: Michael Robertson
reviews.text: The canopy system exceeded our expectations. Strong aluminum structure, clean modern look, and the installation was straightforward. It performed excellently in recent strong winds.

reviews.name: Ahmed Al-Mutairi
reviews.text: Excellent heat resistance and high transparency. The canopy performs well under strong sunlight, and the aluminum frame doesn’t warp or fade. Ideal for the Gulf climate.

reviews.name: Sofia Martínez
reviews.text: We used PolyCanopy for a rooftop café project in Buenos Aires. The materials are top-notch, especially the polycarbonate panel — very clear and durable. Our clients love the result.

reviews.name: Lisa Chen
reviews.text: Excellent material quality – especially the polycarbonate panel. The transparency is high and much safer than glass. Plus, we don’t have to worry about falling objects from upstairs. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Thulani Mokoena
reviews.text: The aluminum frame is robust and lightweight. We also appreciate the gutter system design — very useful during seasonal rains. It looks great on commercial buildings too.
